title: subworkflow - aws copy ami image
description:
Subworkflow to copy or encrypt an AMI image using AWS Systems Manager

Parameters:

sourceAmiId: (Required) Source AMI ID to copy
sourceRegion: (Required) Source region
targetRegion: (Required) Target region
amiName: (Optional) Name for the copied AMI
encrypt: (Optional) Encrypt the copied AMI (true/false)
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) AWS OIDC connection

Waits for copy to complete
guide:
## 📋 **Copy AMI Image**

Copies or encrypts an AMI via SSM.
